title: UPI OC 169 Enhancement in UPI LITE transaction limit to ₹500
text:
NC)

NATIONAL PAYMENTS CORPORATION OF INDIA

NPCI/UPI/OC No. 169/2023-24 34% August 2023

To All Member-Unified Payments Interface (UPI)

Dear Madam/Sir,

Subject: Enhancement in UPI LITE transaction limit to 7500

UPI LITE has been designed to play a vital role in reducing infrastructure load on the Core Banking
System of the banks. This feature has been making the small value transactions faster and highly

reliable for transaction value below =200.

As per the latest circular issued by RBI on 24" August, 2023 vide Circular No: RBI/2023-24/57
CO.DPSS.POLC.No.S526/02-14-003/2023-24 with subject ‘Enhancing transaction limits for Small
Value Digital Payments in Offline Mode’, the upper limit of an offline payment transaction is now
increased from %200 to 500.

In view of the above, the per transaction value limit for UP! LITE (Purpose code 44 - Online and

45 - Offline) has now been enhanced to %500. The details are as below:

UPI LITE Limit Previous Limit_| New Limit |
Per Transaction = 200 = 500 |
Max balance in UPI lite account = 2000 % 2000 (No change)

The existing UPI pricing shall be applicable for transaction amount %201-%500 for both P2P and P2M
transactions.

With reference to the above, Member Banks (Payee PSP), Third Party App providers (TPAPs),
Merchants and other payment providers are requested to take note of the above enhancement and
undertake requisite changes on the App & application systems. Members are requested to make the

necessary changes with immediate effect.

Yours sincerely,

SD/-
Kunal Kalawatia JOOIA, The Capital, B Wing, 10" Floor,
Chief of Products Bandra Kurla Complex, Bandra (E), Mumbai 400 051-
